text:
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Father forwarded a message from Alison Kling about Erin's show.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports website bugs and UX feedback for the CG site.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch forwarded a new Kenneth Gergen publication for teaching reference.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests a text edit changing 'human' to 'our' in a line.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch proposes changing popups to hyperlinked pages due to editing limitations.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch approves the 'what' page format and requests navigation and layout changes.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests moving the VG page into performances and adjusting the logo color.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley confirms a Zoom meeting scheduled for Saturday morning at 10am Pacific Daylight Time.
- [no action] Supabase: Automated security notification about a new OAuth application being authorized for Supabase.
- [no action] Supabase: Automated welcome email from Supabase onboarding new users to their platform.
- [no action] GitHub: Automated GitHub security alert about a third-party OAuth application being added to the account.
